generic_name: Yogurt su Frutta bio magro da latte fieno STG - 150g - lampone

ingredients_text: Yogurt magro 80% (latte* scremato pastorizzato, fermenti lattici vivi), preparato al lampone 20% (lampone* 9% sul totale, zucchero*, amido*, pectina, succo di limone da concentrato*). Senza glutine. *da agricoltura biologica.
ingredients_text_de: Magerjoghurt* 80%, Himbeerzubereitung 20% (Himbeeren* 9%, Zucker*, Stärke*, Pektin, Zitronensaftkonzentrat*) Glutenfrei. *aus biologischer Landwirtschaft.
ingredients_text_en: Skimmed milk* 80%, yogurt with live active cultures, raspberry flavouring 20% (raspberry* 9%, sugar*, starch*, pectin, lemon juice concentrate*). Gluten free *organic.
